entity.name: China MIIT / CAC

CAC runs the generative-AI registration and content-control regime (effective Aug 2023); MIIT handles industrial policy, model standards, and chip supply. Together they define the principal foreign AI regime US policy responds to.

activity.title: 专家解读｜筑牢安全防线让拟人化互动服务行稳致远
activity.raw_text: 近日，国家互联网信息办公室等五部门联合公布《人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法》（以下简称《办法》）。《办法》贯彻落实习近平总书记关于统筹发展和安全"的重要论述，通过划定拟人化互动服务的安全底线，在现有法律法规体系框架下进一步明确了服务的总体原则、具体服务规范、监督检查机制及相关主体的法律责任，是促进该领域健康有序发展的重要制度保障。一、统筹发展与安全，确保拟人化互动服务安全有序运行。

_verify_phrases: 筑牢安全防线让拟人化互动服务行稳致远

enrichment.summary: China's Cyberspace Administration (CAC) and four other ministries jointly published the "Interim Measures for the Administration of Anthropomorphic Interactive Services in Artificial Intelligence," accompanied by an official expert commentary. The measures establish safety baselines for AI services that simulate human-like interaction, defining general principles, specific service norms, supervision and inspection mechanisms, and legal responsibilities for relevant parties. The commentary frames the regulation as implementing Xi Jinping's directive to balance development and security. The measures apply within the existing legal framework and are described as an institutional safeguard for the healthy and orderly development of anthropomorphic AI interaction services.
enrichment.stance_quote: 通过划定拟人化互动服务的安全底线，在现有法律法规体系框架下进一步明确了服务的总体原则、具体服务规范、监督检查机制及相关主体的法律责任

activity.title: 国家网信办等五部门联合公布《人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法》答记者问
activity.raw_text: 4月10日，国家网信办、国家发展改革委、工业和信息化部、公安部、市场监管总局联合公布《人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法》（以下简称《办法》），自2026年7月15日起施行。国家网信办有关负责人表示，《办法》旨在促进人工智能拟人化互动服务（以下简称拟人化互动服务）健康发展和规范应用，维护国家安全和社会公共利益，保护公民、法人和其他组织的合法权益。近年来，拟人化互动服务快速发展，在文化传播、适幼照护、适陪伴等领域的创新应用不断涌现。

_verify_phrases: 国家网信办、国家发展改革委、工业和信息化部、公安部、市场监管总局联合公布

enrichment.summary: On April 10, 2026, China's Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) and four other ministries jointly published the "Interim Measures for the Administration of Anthropomorphic Interactive Services of Artificial Intelligence," set to take effect July 15, 2026. The regulation aims to promote healthy development and standardized application of AI anthropomorphic interactive services (e.g., AI companions and caregiving applications), while safeguarding national security, public interests, and the legal rights of citizens and organizations. A CAC official stated the measures respond to the rapid growth of such services in areas including cultural dissemination, childcare, and companionship applications.

activity.title: 人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法
activity.raw_text: 《人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法》已经2026年2月2日国家互联网信息办公室2026年第3次室务会会议审议通过，并经国家发展和改革委员会、工业和信息化部、公安部、国家市场监督管理总局同意，现予公布，自2026年7月15日起施行。第一条 为了促进人工智能拟人化互动服务健康发展和规范应用，维护国家安全和社会公共利益，保护公民、法人和其他组织的合法权益，根据《中华人民共和国网络安全法》、《中华人民共和国数据安全法》、《中华人民共和国个人信息保护法》、《未成年人网络保护条例》等法律、行政法规，制定本办法。

_verify_phrases: 人工智能拟人化互动服务管理暂行办法
payload.bill_or_act_id: 国家互联网信息办公室令第21号

enrichment.summary: China's Cyberspace Administration (CAC), together with the NDRC, MIIT, Ministry of Public Security, and State Administration for Market Regulation, issued the "Interim Measures for the Administration of AI Anthropomorphic Interactive Services." The regulation was approved at the CAC's 3rd office meeting on February 2, 2026, and takes effect July 15, 2026. It aims to promote healthy development and standardized application of AI anthropomorphic interactive services, protect national security and social public interests, and safeguard the lawful rights of citizens and organizations. The legal basis includes China's Cybersecurity Law, Data Security Law, Personal Information Protection Law, and the Regulations on the Protection of Minors Online.

activity.title: 专家解读｜以人为本划定数字虚拟人服务边界，助力智能经济高质量发展
activity.raw_text: 2026年《政府工作报告》提出，"打造智能经济新形态，深化拓展'人工智能+'"。数字虚拟人是利用图形学、数字图像处理或者人工智能等技术，借助真人驱动或计算驱动，模拟人类外貌、行为、交互能力等特征的虚拟人物形象。数字虚拟人凭借低成本、强交互、高效率、全天候等显著优势，快速成为智能经济发展的重要抓手。一是底层技术迭代，重构智能经济生产力。基于深度学习的形象生成、语音合成、动作捕捉、情感计算等技术日趋成熟。

_verify_phrases: 以人为本划定数字虚拟人服务边界

enrichment.summary: China's Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) published an expert commentary interpreting policy guidelines for digital virtual human (数字虚拟人) services, framed around the 2026 Government Work Report's call to develop "intelligent economy" through AI expansion. The piece explains that digital virtual humans—AI-driven simulated human figures—are becoming a key driver of the intelligent economy due to their low cost, strong interactivity, and 24/7 availability. It outlines underlying technologies such as deep learning-based image generation, speech synthesis, motion capture, and affective computing, and positions human-centered principles as the boundary-setting framework for these services.
enrichment.stance_quote: 数字虚拟人凭借低成本、强交互、高效率、全天候等显著优势，快速成为智能经济发展的重要抓手。

activity.title: "清朗·2026年营造喜庆祥和春节网络环境"专项行动公开曝光一批典型案例
activity.raw_text: 一、"心跳存档"等账号借争议话题，恶意挑动负面情绪。微博账号"心跳存档"、微信账号"臧老师商业咨询"、小红书账号"匡少见"等，宣扬不良价值观，恶意挑动性别对立。抖音账号"晨晨晨可爱""茗兮"等，以晒春节压岁钱、比拼年货档次等名义发布炫富内容，挑起攀比对立情绪。二、"回头是岸.."等账号为违法活动引流，借机牟利。三、"胖公公Ai"等账号生成传播"数字泔水"等垃圾信息，干扰网络生态。

_verify_phrases: 公开曝光一批典型案例

enrichment.summary: China's Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) publicly disclosed a batch of typical violation cases identified during its "Qinglang · 2026 Spring Festival Clean Cyberspace" special campaign. The cases include social media accounts on Weibo, WeChat, Douyin, and Xiaohongshu accused of spreading negative values, inciting gender conflict, promoting ostentatious wealth displays, and driving traffic to illegal activities. Notably, one account named "胖公公Ai" was cited for generating and spreading AI-produced "digital slop" (低质垃圾信息) that disrupts the online ecosystem.
enrichment.stance_quote: "胖公公Ai"等账号生成传播"数字泔水"等垃圾信息，干扰网络生态。

activity.title: 中央网信办启动"清朗·2026年营造喜庆祥和春节网络环境"专项行动
activity.raw_text: 为了营造喜庆祥和、积极向上的春节网络氛围，中央网信办决定即日起开展为期1个月的"清朗·2026年营造喜庆祥和春节网络环境"专项行动。（三）炮制传播不实信息。一是编造涉春运保障、节日市场供应、社会公共安全领域突发事件等方面谣言，伪造发布"春节政策""事故通报"等权威公告，甚至传播所谓"阴谋论"。（四）为违法活动引流。一是进行赌球活动引流，以"赛事竞彩分析""预测球赛结果"等为由，为赌球提供付费咨询。

_verify_phrases: 营造喜庆祥和春节网络环境

enrichment.summary: China's Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) launched a one-month "Qinglang" special campaign to clean up the online environment during the 2026 Spring Festival. The action targets the spread of misinformation, including fabricated emergency announcements, fake "Spring Festival policy" notices, and conspiracy theories related to transportation safety, holiday markets, and public security. The campaign also targets illegal activity referrals such as paid sports gambling tip services disguised as "match analysis" or "result prediction."
